title: Spectrumcraft Pack
description: The resource pack used for the Spectrumcraft SMP
body:
![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XoDo0OlX/images/52cde0dc4a7230c220fba451aaccd6d69448a2c7.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XoDo0OlX/images/52cde0dc4a7230c220fba451aaccd6d69448a2c7.png)

### The resource pack used for the [Spectrumcraft SMP](https://modrinth.com/modpack/spectrumcraft-smp) Modpack

A compatibility layer with [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) and [Fresh Moves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tras-fresh-player) can be found in [Spectrumcraft Pack + Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-spectrumcraft-pack)

# Resource Pack Features:

## CIT Support

<details>
<summary> Armor Sets </summary>

These armor models use **[Expanded Entity Armor Model Format](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/expanded-entity-armor-model)**

The armor sets are all Netherite armor, so you just need to replace Netherite `part` with `set name`  `part`, for example, instead of `Netherite Chestplate` you need `Legacy Spectral Chestplate`

![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XoDo0OlX/images/ec0f039b50420e476cec642fd8f25a87a0692056.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XoDo0OlX/images/ec0f039b50420e476cec642fd8f25a87a0692056.png)

</details>

<details>

<summary>Spectral Tools</summary>

The Spectral and Legacy Spectral tools are all Netherite tools, so you just need to replace Netherite `tool` with `set name`  `tool`, for example, instead of `Netherite Sword` you need `Legacy Spectral Sword`

![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XoDo0OlX/images/819cb924c91ccf0ccf8416a70d41548ecc58d231.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XoDo0OlX/images/819cb924c91ccf0ccf8416a70d41548ecc58d231.png)

</details>

### Additional Tools And Cosmetics

<details>
<summary>Pumpkin Heads Cosmetics</summary>

The Pumpkin Head Overlay was changed so it doesn't bother the player's view (aka, it doesn't exist)

So far there are only 3 heads `TV Nauta` Which is the TV Head, and `Miku` & `Miku Hair`

`Miku` is meant to be used for already existing Hatsune Miku Skins, so they don't have to deal with the 3D hair, and they just get the microphone and the head from the sides 

![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XoDo0OlX/images/beb19bab3c2418123298db5f0e4cece8359b1152.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XoDo0OlX/images/beb19bab3c2418123298db5f0e4cece8359b1152.png)

</details>

<details>

<summary>Additional Tools</summary>

These Additional Items are extras that I've added because I thought they were neat

The `Spectral Scythe` and `Repear's Showtime` work for both the `Netherite Sword` and `Netherite Hoe`, and The `Spectral Dual Axe` is exclusive to the `Netherite Axe`

![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XoDo0OlX/images/4aaed37a4d10c524d2ce33ff47eca056c353e18a.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XoDo0OlX/images/4aaed37a4d10c524d2ce33ff47eca056c353e18a.png)

</details>
